meeting.track_notes: Turf. Summer course 2800m in circumference with 600m run-in. Winter course 2700m with 450m run-in. Races up to 1200m testing straight course (1200m races are occasionally run round the turn, starting on the Summer course and ending on the Winter course); beyond 1200m anti-clockwise round turn. DRAW: Low-numbers draws slightly preferred all races. Wet going can impact on draw in 1200m 1400 W m
meeting.draw_bias_notes: DRAW: Low-numbers draws slightly preferred all races. Wet going can impact on draw in 1200m 1400 W m

races.race_name: Hollywoodbets KENILWORTH WELCOMES YOU MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE (Fillies)
races.race_type: For 2 yof R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: SNOWBIRD has run two solid races in succession and should be the one to beat with more improvement to come. IN HOT WATER ran very well on debut. She caught the eye behind Mystic Inferno and must have a big chance. EL COHETE showed speed in her last but the conditions turned up soft and that didn’t help her. She can bounce back to her best form and be com- etitive. JULIET OF VERONA played up on debut but wasn’t beaten far. She may appreciate the extra 200m. LADY OF SUNSHINE is another with improvement to come.

races.race_name: LUCKY FISH SAHARA RICHES CASH COL- LECT MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE
races.race_type: For 2 yo R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: REDFORD must have a big winning chance in this field as he has run two excellent races behind two smart horses. RUBEE KING travelled like a winner on debut when finishing just over one length behind Earn The Weekend and can improve going into his second run. BLACKBIRD ran a fair race on debut and should prefer the step up in trip to 1200m. ROYAL LIGHT was beaten just under nine lengths by stable companion Kalahari King up the straight and even though he wants further, he may do some good work late.

races.race_name: BET WITH TOTE www.tote.co.za MAIDEN PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: RABDAN just needed his run back after a lengthy break. He was only beaten just over six lengths by promising Tag And Release. This race lacks strong form so with natural improve- ment still to come from this young horse, he can score. PITERAQ rarely runs a bad race, however, she has been frustrating as she has been unable to win. She does try hard and her form is consistent. RACHETTU ran a much better race behind Hedrivesmecrazy and if he brings that performance to the track again, he will be competitive. First-timer GIMME MORE APACHE wouldn’t need to be special to win on debut so watch the market closely.

races.race_name: FOLLOW RACE COAST ON SOCIAL MEDIA MAIDEN PLATE (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: REDLIGHT LANE lost her race last time in the boardroom. She drops in trip to 1400m and with some luck in running from a tricky draw, she can get it right this time. NICCI’S LAW finished just behind REDLIGHT LANE. She is better off at the weights and even though she is well tried in the maiden ranks, this could be an ideal opportunity for her to get it right from a decent draw. SCANDALIZE has run two nice races with blinkers fitted and can show more now that she steps up in trip to 1400m. AUTUMN RUSH will need luck from a tough draw.

races.race_name: RACE COAST INCENTIVES POWERED BY Hollywoodbets B STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: KING’S QUEST won impressively at Hollywoodbets Durbanville and was given four points for that smart victory. He steps up in class but from a neat draw can progress further so include him in all bets. MENTE ET MANU has a light weight to carry in his first run back from a short break and the drop in trip could suit. CHASINGTHERAINBOW has been rested and has changed stables. Richard Fourie gets the ride on this smart gelding and he needs to be taken seriously. IN A TIMELY MANNER was far from disgraced in the East Cape Guineas. His chances must be respected from a good draw.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: BACKINTHEFASTLANE quickened smartly to win well with the blinkers fitted. he was given six points for that win. The form of that race has worked out well and he must have a big chance again. BATON ROUGE stayed on well for third in a tough race. If he repeats he should go close to winning. LOUI’S STAR ran a lovely race straight out of the maidens. Her form is good with blinkers fitted and if she gets some luck in running from a tricky draw, she should be right there. HEAVENLY PRINCE ran a fair race just under six lengths behind Backinthefastlane. He could sneak into the Quartet.

races.race_name: FOLLOW GALLOP TV ON SOCIAL MEDIA CLASS 5
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: AVIGNON was gutsy in the finish, winning a good race last time. He loves the straight course at Hollywoodbets Kenilworth and should be competitive again. OZARK is knocking on the door for his next career victory. He was only just beaten by AVIGNON with an apprentice up and now has Richard Fourie in the irons. VERCICAT looks progressive and can score again after winning well from the front. Include him in all bets. SHIFTING PATH might be the value play in this tricky race. He has dropped further in the ratings and should be doing some good late work.

races.race_name: LUCKY FISH FIRE STRIKE MIDDLE STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: MAGICAL PLACE won like a smart sprinter in the making. That was his first run back after a lengthy break in which he was gelded. He was given six points for that good win last time but could be anything. Highly regarded DEMANDING DAVE was a touch unlucky when finishing just over one length behind Dance Variety in the Easter Sprint and could make amends. NORTH POINT loves this 1000m and at the weights of his last run, should finish much closer to Magical Place. FLYING FINLEY has furnished into a nice sprinter and should contest the finish.
